description:
there can be many ways to attack for black (and defend for white), so if you see anything better please post as comment!

I'm thinking now, could be more interesting to ask white to defend....

(actually in the game there was no stone at P16 -- and that was the point where I made the critical attack -- but this is  the subject for the next problem...)
